description: Recurring manual dotfiles commit-and-push cycles across sessions, including broken cron attempts and path issues
Each new jhana/weekend session requires manually orchestrating emulator startup, ADB connection, port reversal, app install, and MCP verification
Date planning agent invoked manually each time with weather data, calendar checks, and idea list — automation attempted but blocked by auth issues
Intender Chrome Web Store release cycle (build asset, generate promo images, upload) done manually each time
Harness and MCP setup manually copied between projects (jhana to weekend) rather than templated
Manual drift analysis comparing live Mint state to NixOS config, with user wanting automatic detection of ephemeral changes
